summary: Quick Purchase Direct Stock In - ARSITEKTUR FINAL OCB TITAN - All tests PASSED

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning for <span> inside <option> - cosmetic only, no functional impact

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ /api/purchase/quick endpoint correctly creates PO with status='posted' and is_quick_purchase=true
✓ Stock immediately added to product_stocks collection after Quick Purchase
✓ QPO prefix used for Quick Purchase orders, PO prefix for regular POs
✓ Regular PO (/api/purchase/orders) creates draft status - stock NOT added until 'Terima Barang'
✓ Products.jsx correctly shows branch_id filter with stock aggregation from product_stocks
seed_data_creation: Created test PO QPO000059 via UI, PO000060 via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Purchase flow fully tested. QPO prefix confirms direct stock in, PO prefix for regular draft PO.

post_api_purchase_quick.evidence: Creates PO with status='posted', is_quick_purchase=true, stock immediately updated

stock_immediately_reflected.evidence: QPO000059 created via UI - cart cleared, success toast shown, stock updated

stock_movement_recorded.evidence: stock_movements collection has entries with reference_type='quick_purchase'

qpo_prefix.evidence: Quick Purchase orders use QPO prefix (e.g., QPO000059)

regular_po_draft_status.evidence: POST /api/purchase/orders creates PO000060 with status='draft', no stock movement

products_branch_filter.evidence: Products page shows 103 branches, filters correctly, shows 'Stok (Cabang)' header

quick_purchase_ui_labels.evidence: 'STOK LANGSUNG' badge, 'SIMPAN & STOK MASUK' button, green theme

stok_langsung_message.evidence: 'Stok langsung bertambah setelah simpan' message displayed

architecture_compliance.cabang_gudang_unified: VERIFIED - branch_id used for stock location

ui_test_results.success_toast_after_save: PASS - shows 'Pembelian Berhasil!', QPO number, 'Stok langsung bertambah'
